status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/entity/ph/gov/privacy.json for the commission itself.

data.official_name: Republic Act No. 10173, Data Privacy Act of 2012
data.notes: Took effect September 8, 2012. Congress-enacted, GDPR-like scope with extraterritorial reach. Created the National Privacy Commission (NPC), attached to the Department of Information and Communications Technology (DICT).
